name: Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, inaccurate demand forecasting causes stockouts. We provide automated replenishment orders instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Inability to accurately forecast demand leads to stockouts.
features: Demand forecasting based on historical sales data
Simple interface for generating replenishment orders

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to accurately forecast demand leads to stockouts.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, inaccurate demand forecasting causes stockouts. We provide automated replenishment orders instead of manual tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of inventory levels and demand forecasting.
must_have_features: Demand forecasting based on historical sales data
Simple interface for generating replenishment orders
